_comment: Lineage Provisions 'Beef Sticks Sizzle' food-product sizzle — THE WORKED EXAMPLE. Copy to config.json and edit. A ~14s warm-tungsten macro-tabletop 9:16 sizzle for a physical grass-fed beef-stick product: WORDLESS (no VO), driven by a non-diegetic bluegrass bed + diegetic snap/tear SFX. Pipeline: (1) ~4 photographic macro keyframes via create-image-fal (the box hero grounds on the REAL product PNG); (2) one locked-off anti-shake create-video-fal i2v clip per keyframe (tear / flat-lay / bite / box-hero); (3) an ElevenLabs Music ~22s bluegrass bed trimmed of its 2.5s sparse intro + two ffmpeg-lavfi diegetic SFX; (4) a STATIC PIL end card (real Lineage logo PNG + real product PNG + serif headline + CTA) + ffmpeg filter_complex concat + anti-AI grain pass + audio composite + 5 serif stat-callout pills. Master 1080x1920 h264+aac, ~14.04s (24fps). See scripts/PIPELINE.md for the source scripts.
title: Grass-fed. Air-dried. Nothing else.

look_pack.name: WARM_TUNGSTEN_KITCHEN
palette_anchors: warm tungsten window daylight, slightly desaturated
look_pack.style_descriptor: Tactile macro-tabletop food photography, warm tungsten kitchen register, linen + wood + butcher paper + cast iron surfaces, warm window daylight raking from camera-left, slight 35mm film grain. Photographic, NOT cinematic, NOT smooth. iPhone-shot daytime kitchen feel, NOT studio polish. Sharp focus on the product. 1080x1920 vertical.
look_pack.negative_tail: NO studio polish, NO bokeh, NOT shallow DOF, NO smooth digital 3D render, NO AI-illustration look. NO invented label text, NO captions, NO brand wordmarks rendered by the model (the brand appears only on the composited end card). NO faces beyond a partial jaw / hands crop. Vertical 9:16 composition.
look_pack._note: ONE look pack drives all 4 keyframes so the sizzle reads as one spot. Palette sampled from the Lineage packaging + site (brand-research/visual-identity.md). The 'no invented label text' negative is load-bearing — the box hero grounds on the real product PNG so the label is real.

keyframe_engine.product_ref: S04 (box hero) passes the real meat-sticks-classic.png (+ the variety pack) as media[role=image] with 'reproduce the label EXACTLY, invent no text'; S01/S02/S03 pass no product ref
keyframe_engine._note: See scripts/.hf_S04.json — it threaded the real box + variety-pack PNGs as media_input and instructed the model to reproduce the label exactly. NEVER include readable brand text in a prompt — the model garbles it into typos.

clip_engine.anti_shake_tail: Camera is locked off, tripod-stable. NO shake, NO wobble, NO earthquake. Slow, deliberate motion only.
clip_engine._note: Locked-off, anti-shake. Submitted SEQUENTIALLY (gen_clips_hf.sh) to avoid the burst-credit reserve gate. Per-scene durations match tStart/tEnd — S01/S02 3s, S03/S04 4s.

music.prompt: Upbeat warm bluegrass instrumental. Picked banjo as the lead voice with a supportive flat-picked acoustic guitar and very light brush percussion. Friendly Americana, ranch-honest, heritage food-brand register. NO vocals, NO fiddle solo, NO heavy drums. Mid-tempo, major key, walking forward groove. The banjo and guitar should start IMMEDIATELY with a clear rolling phrase — do NOT begin with silence or a long sparse intro. Builds slightly in energy toward the end with one tasteful banjo flourish around the 16-second mark.
music._note: gen_music_v2.py requested 22s to allow the 2.5s sparse-intro trim; build_master_v2.sh step 1 trims start=2.5, loudnorm I=-16, fade in 0.4s + fade out 1.0s, clamps -t 14.04. No artist names (ElevenLabs Music ToS filter).

cues.name: snap
cues.note: crisp white-noise crack at the fiber tear (S01), highpass 900 / lowpass 5500, acompressor

cues.name: tear
cues.note: pink-noise pull at the box-open / hand reach (S04), highpass 350 / lowpass 4000

sfx._note: Two short diegetic hits synthesized with ffmpeg lavfi anoisesrc (make_sfx.sh) at measured cue points.

scenes.keyframe_prompt: Slow-motion macro: two weathered hands hold a dark grass-fed beef stick at a break line on butcher paper, coarse meat fibers visible, a few crumbs. Warm window daylight from camera-left.
scenes.motion_hint: The two weathered hands tear the dark grass-fed beef stick apart; real coarse meat fibers stretch and separate at the break line; a few crumbs fall straight down with gravity; hands stay in frame, daylight steady from camera-left.

scenes.keyframe_prompt: Top-down flat lay of three beef sticks fanned on butcher paper next to a single sprig of rosemary and flaky salt. Warm daylight, slight film grain.
scenes.motion_hint: Gentle slow 2% top-down push-in on the flat lay; a tiny breath of air moves one rosemary leaf slightly; salt grains catch the light; otherwise still life.

scenes.keyframe_prompt: Side profile, ONLY the jaw and lower lip in frame (eyes and forehead cropped OUT), a man about to bite a beef stick. Background defocused warm ivory-brown, consistent stubble shadow.
scenes.motion_hint: The man bites cleanly into the beef stick — a clean tear, then a slow chew; background stays defocused warm ivory-brown; stubble shadow stays consistent.

scenes.keyframe_prompt: Locked medium shot. The EXACT Lineage Provisions 100% Grass-Fed Beef Sticks Original box (from the reference PNG) stands upright on a light oak kitchen counter with a linen runner. A man's hand enters from the right edge, fingers reaching to lift one beef stick out. A second variety pack box (from the reference) sits in soft focus behind. Reproduce the box label EXACTLY as in the reference — invent no text, no captions, no stickers.
scenes.motion_hint: The hand enters from the right, fingers gently grasp one beef stick and lift it slowly straight up out of the box; the box itself stays put; the variety pack stays still in soft focus behind; daylight from camera-left holds steady.

end_card.headline: Grass-fed. Air-dried. Nothing else.
end_card._note: make_end_card.py composes scene-S05.png entirely in PIL — ivory #F6F1E7 bg + the real Lineage wordmark PNG (upper third) + the real meat-sticks-classic product PNG (centered, soft shadow) + the serif headline + the CTA. NEVER AI-rendered. The demo's Memorial-Day promo added the '30% off' tag. Uses a middle dot ' · ' (macOS serif em-dash gap).

stat_callouts._note: The demo burned 5 serif stat-callout pills (ivory or dried-blood-red pill, serif type) at choreographed beats via build_master_v2.sh drawtext. % strings ('100% GRASS-FED', '30% OFF') were written to textfiles (c1.txt / c5.txt) with expansion=none — drawtext reads a raw % as a strftime spec.

grain_pass._note: Anti-AI-look grain applied globally in build_master_v2.sh so the sizzle doesn't read AI-smooth.

audio_mix._note: The bluegrass bed is the full audio bed — no VO to duck under. snap.wav (~1.5s) + tear.wav (~11s) mix in at their cue points. The bed plays UNDER the end card and fades out over the tail — no trailing silence.

music.note: non-diegetic bluegrass bed (no vocals), sparse intro trimmed, loudnorm + fades

sfx.note: diegetic snap (fiber tear) + tear (box-open) at measured cue points

grain.note: anti-AI-look grain (eq + hqdn3d + noise) applied globally

stat_callouts.note: 5 serif stat-callout pills at beats (protein / ingredients / provenance / promo)

end_card.note: static PIL end card (real logo PNG + real product PNG + serif headline + CTA), music under it
